Class HistoryquoteCoverageQueryMsg.InstrumentIdentifier

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.gtnet.model.msg.HistoryquoteCoverageQueryMsg.InstrumentIdentifier
Enclosing class:
HistoryquoteCoverageQueryMsg
public static class HistoryquoteCoverageQueryMsg.InstrumentIdentifier extends Object
Lightweight identifier for an instrument in coverage queries. Contains only the fields needed to identify the instrument without the full metadata.
